areas.notes: Health, profile, governance and warning visibility are implemented.
Goal list/detail, plan tree and governance summary are available.
Task list/detail, timeline/logs and orchestration state are rendered.
Artifact detail, extract/index controls and RAG status/preview are available.
Collection inspect/index/search and template diagnostics/preview are available.
Safe config read and allowlisted write flow with redaction are implemented.
Teams/blueprints plus instruction model/effective stack and guarded selection actions exist.
Autopilot/planner/trigger actions are guarded; audit log analyze and redaction are available.
Pending/stale queue visibility and guarded approve/reject via existing task review API are implemented.
Risk and execution state visibility are in place; complex execution remains browser-first.
Rate-limited, bounded polling for system/task logs is available; no dedicated push stream endpoint yet.
High-risk and complex workflows remain intentionally browser-first.

api_gaps: No explicit dedicated terminal-safe repair execution endpoint is mapped in the current TUI client contract.
No dedicated push-based event stream endpoint is mapped for terminal usage; polling mode is used.
future_polish: Add explicit backend repair execution APIs with dry-run/verify semantics and policy traces.
Add optional push-stream adapter once stable server-side event stream contracts are available.
